summary: Tested 3 critical bug fixes for Belgian users: (1) Belgian analysis returns French content, (2) deadline/financial_exposure fields normalized to strings, (3) all features available for Belgian users. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed all features working on Belgian case detail page.
passed_tests: Login flow works for test_cg@example.com (Belgian Pro user)
GET /api/cases returns 200 with no server errors
All cases have deadline field as string (never dict)
All cases have financial_exposure field as string (never dict)
Belgian case (case_2240e5617f72) has country=BE
Belgian case has French content in ai_findings/ai_next_steps/ai_summary
Belgian case has battle_preview feature with user_side and opposing_side
Belgian case has success_probability (Outcome Predictor)
Risk history endpoint works for Belgian cases
Letter types endpoint returns Belgian letter types with BE_ prefix
Case shares endpoint works for Belgian cases
Case events/timeline endpoint works for Belgian cases
Case documents endpoint works for Belgian cases
US letter types endpoint still works (regression test)
Frontend: Case detail page loads with Risk Score + Graph
Frontend: Findings displayed in French with legal references (Art. VI.82 CDE, etc.)
Frontend: Next Steps displayed in French
Frontend: Archer Outcome Predictor section visible
Frontend: Legal Battle Preview section visible
Frontend: Archer Response Letters with 6 Belgian letter types in French
Frontend: Case Sharing (Shared links) section visible
Frontend: Case Timeline section visible
Frontend: Procedural defects section with French descriptions
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_belgian_bug_fixes.py (New test file for Belgian bug fixes)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing Belgian case case_2240e5617f72 for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Belgian bug fixes fully tested. Key changes verified: (1) get_language_instruction() adds mandatory language rule to all prompts for Belgian users, (2) Case model has field_validators for deadline/financial_exposure that normalize dict→str, (3) Contract Guard persona bug fixed. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_belgian_bug_fixes.py can be reused for regression testing. Belgian case case_2240e5617f72 has full analysis with battle_preview, success_probability, and French content.

BUG_1_Belgian_Language.description: Belgian user analysis now returns content in user's language (FR/NL/DE) instead of English
BUG_1_Belgian_Language.evidence: ai_findings, ai_next_steps, ai_summary all contain French content with Belgian legal references (Art. VI.82 CDE, Code de droit économique, etc.)

BUG_2_Field_Normalization.description: Cases now properly created after document upload with all fields normalized (deadline dict→string, financial_exposure dict→string)
BUG_2_Field_Normalization.evidence: All cases returned by GET /api/cases have deadline and financial_exposure as strings. Backend field_validators in Case model normalize these fields.

BUG_3_Belgian_Features.description: All features (Battle Preview, Outcome Predictor, Response Letters, Score History, Case Sharing, Legal References) now available for Belgian users identically to US users
BUG_3_Belgian_Features.evidence: Frontend case detail page shows all features: Risk Score + Graph, Findings with legal refs, Next Steps, Outcome Predictor, Battle Preview, Response Letters (6 Belgian types), Case Sharing, Timeline, Procedural defects
